# UC-19.1.42 · oVirt / RHV Storage Pool Manager (SPM) Host Missing or Contended

## Description

Only one host should hold SPM for a block/File domain at a time. Loss of SPM blocks LUN operations, snapshot merges, and template imports. Contention or a missing SPM row in API snapshots is a production-impacting condition.

## Value

Prevents storage-domain-wide freezes in oVirt/RHV by detecting SPM election problems before operators notice stuck disk tasks.

## Implementation

Poll storage domains and hosts every 60s. Map `storage_domain.spm_vds_id` (field names vary by API version) into `spm_host_id`. Alert when expected SPM is null or when monitoring shows repeated SPM moves. Correlate with SAN paths and VDSM logs on the candidate hosts.

## SPL

```spl
index=virtualization sourcetype="ovirt:spm" earliest=-15m
| stats latest(spm_host_id) as spm_host, latest(spm_status) as spm_st by storage_domain
| where isnull(spm_host) OR lower(spm_st)!="ok"
| eval issue=case(isnull(spm_host), "No SPM host", like(lower(spm_st), "%contend%"), "SPM contention", 1==1, "SPM status " . spm_st)
| table storage_domain, spm_host, spm_st, issue
```

## Visualization

Table (domains without SPM), Timeline (SPM moves), Single value (domains in contention).

## References

- [oVirt — Storage Pool Manager concepts](https://www.ovirt.org/documentation/admin-guide/chap-Storage.html)
